infestation.enEffect: Gives the target the Bound status.
infestation.zhEffect: 會讓對手變為束縛狀態。

light-of-ruin.enEffect: The user takes 1/2 of the damage dealt by this move.
light-of-ruin.zhEffect: 自己也會受到給予對手傷害的1/2。

first-impression.enEffect:
This move fails unless it is the first move used by the user after
it enters a battle.
first-impression.zhEffect: 不是出場後第一個使出的招式時會失敗。

baneful-bunker.enEffect:
The user protects itself from incoming moves for the turn. Any
attackers that use contact moves against the user during this
turn become poisoned. With each consecutive use, this move’s
chance of success becomes 1/3 of what it was before.
baneful-bunker.zhEffect:
在使用的回合內，從對手的招式保護自己。
會讓對自己使出接觸類招式的對手變為中毒狀態。
連續使用時，成功率會變為上次使用時的1/3。

spirit-shackle.enEffect: Gives the target the Can’t Escape status.
spirit-shackle.zhEffect: 會讓對手變為無法逃走狀態。

darkest-lariat.enEffect:
This move ignores the target’s stat changes when dealing
damage.
darkest-lariat.zhEffect:
會無視對手的能力變化
給予傷害。

sparkling-aria.zhEffect: 會治癒對手的灼傷狀態。

ice-hammer.enEffect: Lowers the user’s Speed stat by 1 stage.
ice-hammer.zhEffect: 會讓自己的速度降低1階。

strength-sap.enEffect:
Restores the user’s HP by an amount equal to the target’s
Attack stat. Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.
strength-sap.zhEffect:
會讓自己回復相當於
對手攻擊數值的HP。
會讓對手的攻擊降低1階。

The user gains the Charging status on the turn this move is used,
then attacks on the following turn. In harsh sunlight, the user
does not gain the Charging status and can attack immediately.
This move’s power is halved in any other weather condition.
solar-blade.zhEffect:
在使用的回合變為蓄勢狀態，
在下一回合進行攻擊。
大晴天狀態時，
可不變為蓄勢狀態立即攻擊。
其他天氣時，威力會變為1/2。

toxic-thread.enEffect: Lowers the target’s Speed stat by 2 stages and poisons it.
toxic-thread.zhEffect:
會讓對手的速度降低2階。
會讓對手變為中毒狀態。

throat-chop.enEffect: Gives the target the Throat Chopped status.
throat-chop.zhEffect: 會讓對手變為地獄突刺狀態。

pollen-puff.enEffect:
When used on an ally, this move restores 1/2 of its max HP
instead of dealing damage.
pollen-puff.zhEffect:
對同伴使用時，不會給予傷害，
而是會讓該同伴回復
最大HP的1/2。

psychic-terrain.enEffect: Turns the entire field into Psychic Terrain for 5 turns.

在5回合內，
會讓整個場上變為精神場地狀態。

lunge.enEffect: Lowers the target’s Attack stat by 1 stage.
lunge.zhEffect: 會讓對手的攻擊降低1階。

fire-lash.enEffect: Lowers the target’s Defense stat by 1 stage.

power-trip.enEffect:

自己的能力變化每提高1階，

burn-up.zhEffect:
自己的火屬性會消失。

使用招式前受到接觸類招式時，

This move’s power is doubled if the user couldn’t act or its move

tearful-look.enEffect:

場上所有寶可夢都會

會減少自己最大HP的1/3，

特防、速度提高1階。
剩餘HP不夠時會失敗。

body-press.enEffect:

此招式不會以攻擊數值，

重力狀態時，

攻擊後，會受到自己

受到精神場地狀態的效果時，
威力會變為1.5倍，

steel-roller.enEffect:

場上沒有場地時會失敗。
會解除場地。

連續攻擊2～5次。

在使用的回合變為蓄勢狀態，

會讓場上自己以外的

有30%的機率會讓對手變為灼傷狀態。

有30%的機率會讓對手變為灼傷狀態。

Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 1 stage on the turn this move is used.
electro-shot.zhEffect:
在使用的回合變為蓄勢狀態，
在下一回合進行攻擊。
下雨狀態時，
可不變為蓄勢狀態立即攻擊。
在使用的回合讓自己的特攻提高1階。

fickle-beam.enEffect: This move has a 30% chance of its power being doubled.
fickle-beam.zhEffect: 有30%的機率威力會變為2倍。

hard-press.enEffect:
The more HP the target has left, the greater this move’s power
(ranging between 1 and 100).
hard-press.zhEffect:
對手的剩餘HP越多，威力越大。
威力會是1～100。

dragon-cheer.enEffect:
Gives allies a Critical-Hit Ratio Boost. Dragon types receive a
2-stage boost. All other types receive a 1-stage boost.
dragon-cheer.zhEffect:
會讓同伴變為易中要害狀態。
龍屬性時+2，其他屬性時+1。

alluring-voice.enEffect:
Confuses the target if its stats were boosted during the turn this
move is used.
alluring-voice.zhEffect:
在使用的回合內，
對手的能力有所提高時，
會讓對手變為混亂狀態。

temper-flare.enEffect:
This move’s power is doubled if the user couldn’t act or its move
missed or failed on the previous turn.
temper-flare.zhEffect:
上一回合自己無法行動、
招式未能擊中或招式失敗時，
威力會變為2倍。

supercell-slam.enEffect:
If this move misses or fails, the user takes damage equal to 1/2
of its max HP. If the target has the Minimized status, this move’s
power is doubled and it will be sure to hit.
supercell-slam.zhEffect:
未能擊中或失敗時會受到自己
最大HP的1/2的傷害。
對變小狀態的對手，
威力會變為2倍且必定會命中。

psychic-noise.enEffect: Gives the target the Healing Prevented status for 2 turns.
psychic-noise.zhEffect:
在2回合內，
會讓對手變為回復封鎖狀態。

upper-hand.enEffect:
Makes the target flinch. This move fails if the target isn’t about
to use a priority move.
upper-hand.zhEffect:
對手沒有使出先制招式時會失敗。
會讓對手畏縮。
